rationale: Section 49.253 governs ballot propositions and maximum tax rates for consolidated taxing districts. The homestead exemption increase affects the tax base, not the rate-setting or ballot format provisions here.
quote: The rate to be included in the proposition shall be provided by the agreement among the districts but may not exceed the maximum rate provided by law for independent school districts.
_note: No direct conflict; §49.253 addresses rate ceilings and ballot language, not exemption amounts or taxable value.
